reviews.comment:
Yo fui hoy 18/4/22 con turnos para las 10 hs para cambio de aceite y filtro, no se porque razón desconectaron la bateria del auto, cuando salgo del lubricentro se para cuando paro en una semáforo , estoy llamando y me dejan colgado sin tener conexión con el personal que realizo el trabajo , es para tener en cuenta

(Translated by Google)
I went today 4/18/22 with appointments for 10 am for oil and filter change, I don't know why they disconnected the car battery, when I leave the lube center it stops when I stop at a traffic light, I'm calling and they leave me hanging without having connection with the personnel who did the work, it is to take into account
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrbzRhTy1nRRAB
